title: linum suffruticosum subsp. ortegae
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. ortegae, also known as the dwarf flax or Mexican flax, is a subspecies of the Linum suffruticosum plant, which is a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linum suffruticosum subsp. ortegae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even provide antioxidant effects. Linum suffruticosum subsp. ortegae is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support various health conditions.
